title: TRON DAO expands AI fund to $1B as agentic economy race heats up
message_html: TRON DAO expands AI fund to $1B as agentic economy race heats up ...
snippet: The $1 billion AI fund targets investments in stablecoin rails, agent identity, tokenized RWAs and developer tooling for autonomous AI systems.

title: Delaware to regulate stablecoins under banking framework in new bill
message_html: Delaware to regulate stablecoins under banking framework in new bill ...
snippet: The stablecoin bill introduced in Delaware aims to create a licensing framework for stablecoin issuers as part of the state's first major banking code update since 1981.

title: Native USDC is officially coming to Injective. Together with @circle, Injective will support native USDC issuance and CCTP directly onchain. No wrapped token...
message_html: Native USDC is officially coming to Injective. Together with @circle, Injective will support native USDC issuance and CCTP directly onchain. No wrapped token... ...
snippet: Injective 🥷 (@injective): Native USDC is officially coming to Injective. Together with @circle, Injective will support native USDC issuance and CCTP directly onchain. No wrapped tokens. No bridges. Just reserve-backed USDC with seamless transfers across 30+ blockchains. Below are some of the top dev
